title: Tortilla Flat
writer: John Lee Mahin, Benjamin Glazer, John Steinbeck
actors: Spencer Tracy, Hedy Lamarr, John Garfield
plot: Danny, a poor northern Californian Mexican-American, inherits two houses from his grandfather and is quickly taken advantage of by his vagabond friends.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
